description: Install python-docx and python-pptx libraries needed for document generation
steps: Verify installation: python -c "from docx import Document; from pptx import Presentation; print('OK')"
verification: python -c "from docx import Document; from pptx import Presentation; print('Libraries installed successfully')"
findings: python-docx 1.2.0 and python-pptx 1.0.2 installed successfully. pyenv is in use; use python3 (not python) to invoke. Added requirements.txt to document dependencies.
